team.date_founded: An early-colonial charter, founded by the first wave of Martian settlers who needed something to do between dust storms.
team.number_of_fans: Around 22 million hard-bitten Martians who travel in dust-caked convoys.
team.badge: A clenched iron fist rising from red soil, set against a black sky with two small moons.
team.home_kit: Oxide-red shirt, black shorts, red socks — the colours of the planet itself.
team.away_kit: Charcoal black with thin red piping and a faint ridge-line of Olympus across the chest.
team.third_kit: Pale dust-grey, worn for derby days against the other Martian sides.
team.history: Mars Athletic are the planet's grinders — a club built not on flair but on the refusal to be beaten. They concede grudgingly, counter ruthlessly, and have made a virtue of frustrating richer, prettier sides into the red dust. Martians love them for it.
team.club_culture: Stubborn, defiant, and proudly unglamorous. Effort is the only currency that buys respect at the Dust Bowl.
team.political_leaning: Martian-nationalist. The club has always carried the planet's chip-on-the-shoulder resentment of inner-system condescension.
trophy_cabinet: Inner League title (one famous, dogged campaign)
Multiple top-half finishes against the odds
legends: Garrick 'The Anchor' Vohl — a centre-back who reportedly never lost a header
achievements: Best defensive record in the league across several seasons

stadium.date_built: Raised in the early colonial era and reinforced against the dust storms ever since.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the Martian mining consortia whose rigs ring the city.
stadium.pitch_size: Tight and compact — deliberately narrow to choke the space attackers crave.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy red-tinted synthetic turf, the only surface that survives the grit.
stadium.bio: The Dust Bowl is one of the most hostile away days in the league — wind-scoured, cold, and packed with fans who treat every opposition pass as a personal affront. Visiting sides talk about the dust in their teeth long after the final whistle.

training_facility.date_built: A functional, weatherproofed complex built when the club first turned professional.
training_facility.sponsors: Maintained on a tight budget by the same mining money that fills the stands.
training_facility.bio: Red Dust Training Grounds is no palace, but it forges hard players. The drills here are built around organisation, recovery runs, and the lung-busting fitness a counterattacking side lives or dies on.

manager.appearance: Tall and rangy, with the leathery, wind-burned look of a man who refuses to coach from indoors.
manager.bio: Dustin Kael is the embodiment of the Mars Athletic way — a former defender who turned an unfashionable career into a managerial creed. He builds walls, waits, and strikes on the break, and he has out-thought managers with ten times his budget.
manager.personality: Dour, disciplined, and allergic to excuses. Smiles roughly once a season.
manager.playing_history: A no-nonsense Martian centre-half who spent his whole career at unglamorous inner-system clubs.
manager.playing_philosophy: Concede nothing, then punish. Defence wins respect; counterattacks win matches.
manager.political_leaning: Quietly Martian-nationalist, like the club he serves.
manager.culture: A son of the red dust who believes hardship makes better footballers.
achievements: Led the club's famous title-challenging campaign on a shoestring

managing_staff.appearance: Squat and intense, with a whistle permanently around his neck and a clipboard that never leaves his hand.
managing_staff.bio: Redd Okafor drills the back line until they move as one organism. Kael trusts him completely with the club's defensive shape, which is to say the club's entire identity.
managing_staff.personality: Obsessive about structure; treats a misplaced marking assignment as a crisis.
managing_staff.playing_history: A journeyman defender who learned the trade the hard way.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: There is no glory in defending, only necessity — so do it perfectly.
managing_staff.political_leaning: Apolitical; the back four is his only nation.
managing_staff.culture: The keeper of the club's defensive faith.
achievements: Architect of the league's meanest defence

players.appearance: Broad and unshakeable, with a goalkeeper's calm in a cage of red metal.
players.bio: Rex Volkov is the reliable last line of a side that asks its keeper to do a lot. Balanced and unflustered, he organises the wall in front of him with a quiet authority.
players.personality: Steady and composed; the calm at the back.

players.appearance: Wiry and sharp, with a full-back's endless engine and a permanent scowl.
players.bio: Zara Kwan attacks every fifty-fifty like a personal insult. Her aggression is the spark in Kael's otherwise patient machine.
players.personality: Fierce and combative; rides the edge of bookings.
players.culture: The Dust Bowl's favourite kind of player.

players.appearance: Tall and unhurried, the calm head in a hot-tempered defence.
players.bio: Orion Steele is the organiser, the one who keeps Kwan's fire from boiling over. A selfless defender who lives for the clean sheet.
players.personality: Selfless and level-headed; the dressing-room peacemaker.

players.appearance: Compact and balanced, reads the counter before it starts.
players.bio: Lira Solano is the spring in the trap — the defender who turns desperate clearances into the first pass of a counterattack.

players.appearance: Scarred and barrel-chested, a veteran who throws his body at everything.
players.bio: Dash Petrov is the heart of the Red Wall, a workhorse defender who has bled for the badge for over a decade. The younger players are terrified of disappointing him.
players.personality: Tireless and demanding; leads by brutal example.
players.culture: The soul of the back line.
achievements: Club captain and record appearance-maker among defenders
players.injuries: Carries the aches of a long career but never misses a match.

players.appearance: Slight and sharp-eyed, the rare flair player in a workmanlike side.
players.bio: Echo Nakamura is the one Martian permitted to dream — the creative spark who launches the counters everyone else finishes.
players.personality: Creative and quick-thinking; the team's imagination.
players.political_leaning: Cosmopolitan; doesn't share the club's nationalism.

players.appearance: Stocky and relentless, covers every blade of the narrow pitch.
players.bio: Flux Santos is the engine that lets Nakamura create — a selfless midfielder who does two players' running so the artist can breathe.
achievements: Most distance covered in the squad

players.appearance: Even-keeled and tidy, the balance of the midfield.
players.bio: Sable Torres is the metronome that keeps the Mars Athletic counter from descending into chaos — composed where her teammates are frantic.

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, lurks on the shoulder of the last defender.
players.bio: Blaze Adeyemi is the tip of the spear, a selfish young finisher who exists to convert the one chance the counter creates. Cold-blooded in front of goal and hungry for more.
players.personality: Selfish and clinical; lives for goals.
players.culture: The lethal point of the counter.
achievements: Top scorer in his breakout season

players.appearance: Strong and direct, never stops harrying the ball.
players.bio: Nova Cruz is the workhorse forward who makes Adeyemi's goals possible, pressing defenders into the mistakes the counter feeds on.

players.appearance: Balanced and quick, comfortable on either flank.
players.bio: Rift Osei is the outlet on the break — a forward who carries the ball seventy metres in a heartbeat when Mars Athletic turn defence into attack.

players.appearance: Older and watchful, the steady understudy in goal.
players.bio: Iron Kato is the veteran backup who keeps Volkov honest. Cautious and experienced, he could start for half the league.
achievements: Long, loyal service as second keeper

players.appearance: Young and rangy, growing into his frame.
players.bio: Red Fontaine is the academy defender being toughened up the Mars Athletic way. Balanced and willing, his education is in stubbornness.

players.appearance: Heavy-legged and unbothered, the squad's resident pessimist.
players.bio: Dust Mensah is the veteran whose talent always outran his appetite for work — kept around for the games his reading of play can still win.
achievements: A title winner in a former life
players.injuries: Fully fit, but slow between matches.

players.appearance: Compact and willing, a tidy squad midfielder.
players.bio: Canyon Joshi is the selfless deputy who keeps the midfield ticking when the starters rest. Never spectacular, never a liability.

players.appearance: Skinny and intense, all sharp angles and ambition.
players.bio: Crater Diaz is the academy striker desperate to be the next Adeyemi — and just as selfish about it. The staff are trying to channel the hunger before it curdles.
players.personality: Selfish and raw; burning to prove himself.
achievements: Top scorer in the youth ranks
